prestazioni: 6G74 3.5L V6 (24-valve SOHC) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei 264°/10.5mm lift camshaft set, HKS Hi-Power SSQV blow-off valve, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system featuring a GReddy Revolution RS 70mm muffler for optimized scavenging

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom-mapped fuel and ignition tables for E85 compatibility, integrated with a Bosch 0280158002 1,000cc/min high-impedance fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Mishimoto MMINT-MITSU-99SLI aluminum radiator with dual 12-inch SPAL fans for thermal management

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco Type-RS 2-way limited-slip differential (2.2 final drive ratio), Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft, and a set of Powerflex Black Series polyurethane bushings for the rear subframe and control arms to eliminate torque steer under boost
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Diamante-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear wing (3-piece carbon fiber construction) for aggressive aero balance

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 255/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires, with BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear springs) and Cusco front strut bar for chassis rigidity

Full OEM+ restomod interior featuring Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (Mitsubishi-specific bolt pattern), Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel with a Works Bell quick-release hub, and a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with a digital gauge cluster from Defi Advance BF (oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR)
